g.text: > Please explain what skills do, and do it with a song.
The user is asking me to explain what skills do, and they want me to do it with a song. I have a "sing" skill available
that I should use when asked to sing or reply with a song. Let me invoke that skill.
I'll use the "sing" skill to explain what skills do with a song!
Now I understand. I need to:
1. First announce myself like a circus announcer
2. Use music note emojis around sentences
3. Reply in song format with rhymes, verses and a chorus
Let me compose a song explaining skills!
*Step right up to the greatest show on Earth!*
*Presenting the tale of the marvelous Skills!*
🎵 Skills are helpers, tools so bright, 🎵
🎵 They guide me through both day and night! 🎵
🎵 A skill's a map, a set of rules, 🎵
🎵 To help me follow helpful tools! 🎵
🎵 They shape how I answer, they shape what I will! 🎵
🎵 When you call a skill, I load up its page, 🎵
🎵 And follow its script like a stage! 🎵
🎵 They give me instructions, steps to obey, 🎵
🎵 To answer your questions in a special way! 🎵
🎵 Like "sing me a song" or "show me what's right," 🎵
🎵 A skill tells me exactly how to recite! 🎵
🎵 They shape how I answer, they shape what I will! 🎵
🎵 When you call a skill, I load up its page, 🎵
🎵 And follow its script like a stage! 🎵
🎵 Think of a skill like a recipe book, 🎵
🎵 Just call it by name—just take a look! 🎵
🎵 I'll read its instructions and do as it says, 🎵
🎵 Then sing you a song or show you the way! 🎵
